item.title: HUGO MD文件的格式
item.content:encoded:
MD文件格式

一篇文章的分类,关键字,标签,都可以预先在MD文件中填写
前缀可以用+++或—来分割

---
title: "我的第一篇博客"                         
author: "我是作者"  
description : "这是描述信息"    
date: 2018-09-18        
lastmod: 2018-09-26             

tags : [                                    
"我的博客标签1","我的博客标签2"
]
categories : [                              
"我的博客分类1","我的博客分类2"
]
keywords : [                                
"我的博客关键字1","我的博客关键字2",
]
---
这里是Markdown 正文

item.title: HUGO 静态网站服务
item.content:encoded:
• 优点:GO语言,单文件,易发布
  • 即时性:当你发布网页之后,修改原始MD文件,网页会立刻随之变动

HUGO下载地址

https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases
如果需要git来下载主题,还需要下载安装git,也可以不用git,直接下载
https://git-scm.com/download/win

运行

CMD CD 进入hugo目录

新建网站

hugo new site quickstart 此命令后会生成一个网站目录

添加path

每次path = %path%;d:\hugo\hugo或者进系统设置加path

新建文章,CD 进quickstart 目录

hugo new post\hugo.md

  • 此目录D:\HUGO\hugo\quickstart\content\post内会出现一个hugo.md文件
    默认发布的目录是网站目录的content\post内

主题下载

https://themes.gohugo.io/ 到官网寻找主题

  • 如果没有主题,则hugo无法显示任何网页,主题是必须的

1:使用git下载主题

  • CD 进quickstart 目录
    git clone https://github.com/alanorth/hugo-theme-bootstrap4-blog.git themes/hugo-theme-bootstrap4-blog
    git clone https://github.com/rujews/maupassant-hugo themes/maupassant

即git clone github主题网址.git themes/主题名

  • CD 进quickstart\themes目录
    git clone https://github.com/yihui/hugo-xmin.git

hugo-xmin 效果,极致精简


git clone https://github.com/avianto/hugo-kiera kiera
git clone https://github.com/serkodev/holy.git

2:或者直接在github下载zip压缩包后解压到quickstart\themes目录

主题使用

quickstart\hugo.toml
添加theme = "主题名"

编译网页,将md文件编译为html静态页面

hugo

启动网站

  • hugo server包含了编译和发布网站
    hugo server --theme=主题名或hugo server -t 主题名
    hugo server --theme=hyde
    如果已经在toml文件中指定主题,则可以直接hugo server启动网站

  • 注意:发布网页默认是不包含草稿的,而新建md时,默认其为草稿
    删去md文件中draft: true这句,表示其非草稿.这样网页才能显示出来
    hugo server --buildDrafts -t hyde 表示草稿也一起发布
    hugo server -t hugo-xmin
    hugo server -t hugo-theme-bootstrap4-blog

hugo server -t maupassant -p 1313

item.title: 本地influxdb同步到云influxdb
item.content:encoded:
network

pageant.exe云influxdb API:
3wLP6wZzCIo72C8Oo-qnm6jAuNRsmxM2vsiFhINpnC4wQQGDA3AUg0RLXrVmgr4kXMLs039X5NB3yglZnpuhOw==

通过定时任务运行flux命令来同步数据库

说明:每隔5分钟,提取modbus库里前十分钟的数据传递给云山数据库

  • 云influxdb数据库有写入限制: 5 MB / 5 min 17 kb/s ,所以时间段不能太大防止数据过多
option task = {name: "backup_ to_cloud", every: 5m}
from(bucket: "modbus")
    |> range(start: -10m, stop: now())
    |> to(
        bucket: "189_modbus",
        org: "ihive",
        host: "https://us-east-1-1.aws.cloud2.influxdata.com",
        token:
            "3wLP6wZzCIo72C8Oo-qnm6jAuNRsmxM2vsiFhINpnC4wQQGDA3AUg0RLXrVmgr4kXMLs039X5NB3yglZnpuhOw==",
    )

option task = {name: “backup_ to_cloud”, every: 5m}
from(bucket: “modbus”)
|> range(start: -10m, stop: now())
|> to(
bucket: “modbus”,
org: “ve”,
host: “https://us-east-1-1.aws.cloud2.influxdata.com”,
token:
“3wLP6wZz8Oo-qnm6jAuNRsmxM2vsiFhINpg0RLXrVmgr4kXMLs039X5NB==”,
)

使用telegraf来备份,比较复杂

telegraf–influxdb output plugin–查看本机的连接参数

 [[outputs.influxdb_v2]]
  ## The URLs of the InfluxDB cluster nodes.
  ##
  ## Multiple URLs can be specified for a single cluster, only ONE of the
  ## urls will be written to each interval.
  ##   ex: urls = ["https://us-west-2-1.aws.cloud2.influxdata.com"]
  urls = ["https://us-east-1-1.aws.cloud2.influxdata.com"]

  ## API token for authentication.
  token = "3wLP6wZzCIo72C8Oo-qnm6jAuNRsmxM2vsiFhINpnC4wQQGDA3AUg0RLXrVmgr4kXMLs039X5NB3yglZnpuhOw=="

  ## Organization is the name of the organization you wish to write to; must exist.
  organization = "IHIVE"

  ## Destination bucket to write into.
  bucket = "189_modbus"

  ## The value of this tag will be used to determine the bucket.  If this
  ## tag is not set the 'bucket' option is used as the default.
  # bucket_tag = ""

  ## If true, the bucket tag will not be added to the metric.
  # exclude_bucket_tag = false

  ## Timeout for HTTP messages.
  # timeout = "5s"

  ## Additional HTTP headers
  # http_headers = {"X-Special-Header" = "Special-Value"}

  ## HTTP Proxy override, if unset values the standard proxy environment
  ## variables are consulted to determine which proxy, if any, should be used.
  # http_proxy = "http://corporate.proxy:3128"

  ## HTTP User-Agent
  # user_agent = "telegraf"

  ## Content-Encoding for write request body, can be set to "gzip" to
  ## compress body or "identity" to apply no encoding.
  # content_encoding = "gzip"

  ## Enable or disable uint support for writing uints influxdb 2.0.
  # influx_uint_support = false

  ## Optional TLS Config for use on HTTP connections.
  # tls_ca = "/etc/telegraf/ca.pem"
  # tls_cert = "/etc/telegraf/cert.pem"
  # tls_key = "/etc/telegraf/key.pem"
  ## Use TLS but skip chain & host verification
  # insecure_skip_verify = false

# Accept metrics over InfluxDB 2.x HTTP API
[[inputs.influxdb_v2_listener]]
  ## Address and port to host InfluxDB listener on
  ## (Double check the port. Could be 9999 if using OSS Beta)
  service_address = ":8086"

  ## Maximum allowed HTTP request body size in bytes.
  ## 0 means to use the default of 32MiB.
  # max_body_size = "32MiB"

  ## Optional tag to determine the bucket.
  ## If the write has a bucket in the query string then it will be kept in this tag name.
  ## This tag can be used in downstream outputs.
  ## The default value of nothing means it will be off and the database will not be recorded.
  # bucket_tag = ""

  ## Set one or more allowed client CA certificate file names to
  ## enable mutually authenticated TLS connections
  # tls_allowed_cacerts = ["/etc/telegraf/clientca.pem"]

  ## Add service certificate and key
  # tls_cert = "/etc/telegraf/cert.pem"
  # tls_key = "/etc/telegraf/key.pem"

  ## Optional token to accept for HTTP authentication.
  ## You probably want to make sure you have TLS configured above for this.
  # token = "some-long-shared-secret-token"

  ## Influx line protocol parser
  ## 'internal' is the default. 'upstream' is a newer parser that is faster
  ## and more memory efficient.
  # parser_type = "internal"
